description: A graphic with a photograph of a low office building behind trees and a parking lot, overlaid with a pale tint. Large text in dark blue and red reads ICE HOUSTON ARRESTS 277 ILLEGAL ALIENS IN JUST 2 WEEKS, INCLUDING CHILD PREDATORS, MURDERERS, DRUG TRAFFICKERS, FOREIGN FUGITIVES, GANG BANGERS. A banner across the bottom carries the Department of Homeland Security seal and reads ICE.gov/NEWSROOM.
